patterns.message: Close to multi-day storm: 39cm over 4 days (needs 3cm/day minimum).
Upslope event Day 2: S/SE wind at 123°, humidity 97%, temp -5°C. Enhanced orographic snowfall likely.
Close to warming concern: Freezing level rising to 1960m (threshold 2000m).
Wind slab risk Day 3: 28 km/h wind with 16cm recent snow. Wind loading on north aspects.
